content_body: We had such a beautiful time! This was my 30th birthday week, and your home exceeded all expectations! Thank you for opening your home to my husband, two boys, and myself. Every day we have enjoyed hiking, spending time together, and relaxing by fires. The view is worth the drive here alone. And you can't have a bad day when you shower under a waterfall or looking out at the mountains when in the hot tub! Thanks so much!
title: Such a Beautiful Time!
